title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・Der Blitz

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(Running while in high spirits has taught me
something.)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I'm still not good enough. I have to keep
running more, and more...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I want to win. The hero always wins in the end!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(Both of them are tenacious and never try to
mask their own ambitions.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(That's what makes them strong and allows them
to take the final step toward victory.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I want to best them, even as they strive for their
own version of what is right, and become number
one.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I want to become number one in this "ultimate
era" and show my parents my success!)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There has been a request to feature me in an
article?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how her unbridled fighting spirit caught
a reporter's attention, leading to a request for an
interview.
choice_data_list:
The tentative title for it is "A Flash in the
Ultimate Era"!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I quite like this clever play on words.
However...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I do not intend to be a mere "flash," but a brilliant
light that will shine on to the very end.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Once I've done what I need to do, I'm setting my
sights on retirement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, it feels like the "end" she has chosen is
drawing near.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: ...Let's go all-out for the autumn Tenno!
...Let's go all-out for the autumn Tenno!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Finally, the moment to finish what I set out to achieve has come. I will emerge victorious from the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to ask what her plans will be after that, but
the sheer determination blazing from Eishin
Flash's eyes stops me in my tracks.
